chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-206 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 623/24 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 624/24 4.For hearing of main case 17-10-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition and submits that the petitioner would avail the alternate and officious remedy before the appropriate forum for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
